challenge.title: Pronadji Najduzu Rec u Stringu
challenge.description:
Vratite duzinu najduze reci u datoj recenici.

Vas odgovor treba da bude broj.

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: findLongestWordLength("The quick brown fox jumped over the lazy dog") treba da vrati broj.
findLongestWordLength("The quick brown fox jumped over the lazy dog") treba da vrati 6.
findLongestWordLength("May the force be with you") treba da vrati 5.
findLongestWordLength("Google do a barrel roll") treba da vrati 6.
findLongestWordLength("What is the average airspeed velocity of an unladen swallow") treba da vrati 8.
findLongestWordLength("What if we try a super-long word such as otorhinolaryngology") treba da vrati 19.

challengeFiles.name: script
